notes: v0.2.9 — Fix: silent auto-update did not refresh tray UI in place because `@tray = nil` at module top reset the reference whenever `load __FILE__` re-ran the body. Now uses `@tray ||= nil` (preserves) + saves reference around the load + uses HtmlDialog#set_html for true in-place HTML refresh. No more flicker, no more requiring you to close and reopen the tray after an update.
